title: Below
plot: In the dark silence of the sea during World War II, the submarine U.S.S. Tiger Shark prowls on what should be a routine rescue mission. But, for the shell-shocked crew, trapped together in the sub's narrow corridors and constricted spaces, this is about to become a journey into the sensory delusions, mental deceptions and runaway fear that lurk just below the surface of the ocean and deep inside the human psyche.
actors: Bruce Greenwood, David Crow, Matthew Davis

categories.label: sealed steel worlds vulnerable to the sea
categories.description: A warship at depth is an enclosed world where flooding, fire, bad air, or mechanical failure can be as deadly as enemy action. What you'll see: watertight doors clanging shut, gauges watched with dread, leaks spreading across plates, and men racing to contain damage.

categories.label: war service wearing down body and mind
categories.description: Long patrols, interrupted sleep, fear of unseen attack, and the knowledge of entrapment put severe strain on crews even when no enemy is in sight. What you'll see: drawn faces, trembling hands, sudden outbursts, superstitious talk, and the oppressive stillness between alarms.

quiz.question: What happens at the end of the story?

options.A: The submarine is captured by a German destroyer and the crew is taken prisoner.
options.B: A British ship rescues the survivors, and the Tiger Shark sinks near the wreck of Fort James.
options.C: The crew reaches a secret base and returns safely to port.

quiz.question: What real historical period is the film set in?

options.A: The Korean War in the early 1950s

key_events.description: The story is set on a U.S. Navy submarine in 1943 during the Second World War.
The submarine patrols the Atlantic amid German U-boat attacks, depth charges, and rescue of torpedoed ship survivors.
